q1_flare_vs_pre.description: Does decay rate increase during flare windows?

q2_flare_class_scaling.description: Kruskal-Wallis: decay ratio across M1-M5 / M5-M9 / X1-X5 / X5+

lag_analysis.description: Days between flare peak and maximum observed decay rate

multivariate_regression.description: OLS: DecayRate ~ log(Int) + Kp + F10.7 + Alt + Group

q3_cme_vs_flare.description: Is CME-window decay larger than flare-window decay? (CME-linked events only)

q4_recovery_time.description: Days until decay rate returns within 1-sigma of pre-flare baseline

control_validation.description: Same Q1 test on non-Starlink debris - confirms atmospheric drag signal
